collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (3 total Queries, 3 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `pendaftaran`.*, `a`.`nama_agama`, `tk`.`nama_tk` as `tk_pilihan`, `pk_a`.`nama_pekerjaan` as `pk_ayah`, `pk_i`.`nama_pekerjaan` as `pk_ibu`, `al`.`provinsi`, `al`.`kabupaten`, `al`.`kecamatan`, `al`.`desa` FROM `pendaftaran` LEFT JOIN `agama` as `a` ON `a`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_agama` LEFT JOIN `taman_kanak_kanak` as `tk` ON `tk`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_tk` LEFT JOIN `pekerjaan` as `pk_a` ON `pk_a`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_pekerjaan_ayah` LEFT JOIN `pekerjaan` as `pk_i` ON `pk_i`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_pekerjaan_ibu` LEFT JOIN `alamat` as `al` ON `al`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_alamat` WHERE `pendaftaran`.`id` = '143'

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `pendaftaran`.*, `a`.`nama_agama`, `tk`.`nama_tk` as `tk_pilihan`, `pk_a`.`nama_pekerjaan` as `pk_ayah`, `pk_i`.`nama_pekerjaan` as `pk_ibu`, `al`.`provinsi`, `al`.`kabupaten`, `al`.`kecamatan`, `al`.`desa` FROM `pendaftaran` LEFT JOIN `agama` as `a` ON `a`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_agama` LEFT JOIN `taman_kanak_kanak` as `tk` ON `tk`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_tk` LEFT JOIN `pekerjaan` as `pk_a` ON `pk_a`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_pekerjaan_ayah` LEFT JOIN `pekerjaan` as `pk_i` ON `pk_i`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_pekerjaan_ibu` LEFT JOIN `alamat` as `al` ON `al`.`id` = `pendaftaran`.`id_alamat` WHERE `pendaftaran`.`id` = '143'
